title: cynoglossum amplifolium
intro: Cynoglossum amplifolium, also known as the Chinese forget-me-not, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cynoglossum amplifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
